## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor / cleanup (no functional change)
- [ ] 🧪 Test addition or improvement
- [ ] ⚙️ CI/CD / Infrastructure

## Component(s) Affected

- [ ] Backend API (`backend/`)
- [ ] Frontend (`frontend/`)
- [ ] ML Models / Training
- [ ] AI Chat / RAG
- [ ] Tests (`tests/`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`)
- [ ] CI/CD (`.github/workflows/`)
- [ ] Infrastructure (Docker, Terraform)

<!-- Detailed list of what changed and why -->

## Testing

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest tests/ --ignore=tests/e2e`)
- [ ] New tests added for this change
- [ ] Manually tested locally
- [ ] No PII exposed in logs or error messages

## Medical Safety Checklist

<!-- Only if touching AI/ML/prediction code -->

- [ ] Medical disclaimers present on AI-generated advice
- [ ] AI inference goes through `core_ai.py` (not direct API calls)
- [ ] No hardcoded model predictions or diagnostic labels
- [ ] Prompts defined in `prompt_registry.py` (not inlined)
